text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian loses to Biwa Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Biwa Hayahide calmly analyzes the
situation. She reminds Narita Brian that she only
lost because she's still in her classic year and in
the process of growing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on to claim that the she won't consider
herself as truly having won until she wins again
next year. The two of them promise each other a
rematch in a senior race.
